summary: Implemented instanced micro-geometry system (US-056). Added a fifth GeometrySystem using THREE.InstancedMesh with 3 seeded primitive types (cube/tetrahedron/octahedron), custom ShaderMaterial with noise3d.glsl curl displacement, CPU-side per-frame matrix updates for bass-driven macro position displacement and treble-driven rotation jitter + scale pulse, quality-tier-adaptive instance counts (low=200, medium=600, high=1200), and crossfade support via setOpacity. All 1088 tests pass, build succeeds.
